title: Choristosoria pteroides
taxonomy: Choristosoria pteroides is classified within the phylum Ascomycota, specifically within the class Leotiomycetes. Further classification places it in the order Rhytismatales, family Choristosoriaceae. The family Choristosoriaceae is a small group of fungi that includes the genus Choristosoria. Choristosoria pteroides is a type of lichenicolous fungus, which means it grows on lichens. Its classification as a lichenicolous fungus helps to explain its unique relationship with its host organisms.
